'''CarsinShare''' was one of the many corporations which had its headquarters situated in [[Stratablock 7]] on [[Metellos/Legends|Metellos]].

==History==
CarsinShare, and its rival, [[Nonsu]], were primary buyers and sellers of business information. They also created much of the material made to create and maintain the floating [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Ektra]]. CarsinShare and Nonsu also held [[Death/Legends|death]] matches deep within the bowels of Ektra, pitting their champion [[Gladiator/Legends|gladiators]] against each other in bloody fights of death.<ref name="CCW" />

At some period, the chief of CarsinShare was [[Hynla]].<ref name="CCW" />
